sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT * FROM repeat_row(1, 'sample', 100);
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT * FROM repeat_row(2, 'data', num_rows = 5);
UPDATE test_table SET column1 = 'updated' WHERE column1 = 'sample';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE column1 IN (SELECT * FROM repeat_row(1, 'sample', 3));
